title: Creamy Citrusy Indian Chicken Curry
description: A low-calorie and flavorful Indian dish featuring green curry paste and tandoor chicken, perfect for the monsoon season
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large bowl, whisk together the yogurt, green curry paste, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper
Add the chicken to the bowl and mix until the chicken is well coated
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat
Remove the chicken from the bowl and cook in the skillet until browned on all sides
Transfer the chicken to a baking dish and bake in the oven for 20 minutes
While the chicken is baking, cook the onion and garlic in the same skillet until the onion is translucent
Add the cooked onion and garlic to the baking dish with the chicken and stir to combine
Return the baking dish to the oven and bake for an additional 10 minutes
